fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Shared workflow code derives upstream blocker trees and downstream unlock trees with ordered nested nodes and frontier leaf metrics. 2. CLI workflow commands expose blockers and nested unblocked-by tree views, while prioritized lists incorporate recently-unblocked ordering after convergence pressure. 3. Agent-facing machine-readable surfaces keep parity for the new ordering metadata and tree payloads where the workflow commands are exposed. 4. The implementation uses indexed workflow facts or targeted subgraph traversal so large ticket graphs remain practical to query.
